candidate_lesson: When live indicator conviction reads 100% but green_matches=0 (no historical analog confirmed in memory), treat the signal as UNVERIFIED and cap size — full conviction without a single matched historical pattern is overfit noise, not edge.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.6  # require at least 1 matched historical analog before full size
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
